greeting: a terminal. of course there is. ask for what you need.
help: ls            -> what is here. type a listing to walk there
blog          -> just guess where it takes you
secrets       -> how many you have found. not which
unknown: not a command. I respect the attempt.
no. but type `help` and we can pretend this went well.
command not found. believe me, I know the feeling.
I wrote every command in here and that is not one of them.

hints.hesoyam: an old cheat from an old city in a game once played still works here.
hints.stillness: type the Sanskrit word for the one who only watches.
hints.tathastu: the browser console has been greeting you this whole time.
hints.nightowl: come back between midnight and four. the page keeps different company then.
hints.photo: hold memories in photographs, really hold them.
hints.chai: what drink that cannot be refused.
hints.done: nothing left to find other than nirvana nirvana nirvana nirvana nirvana nirvana nirvana....

wordAck.hesoyam: still works. some cities never close.

tathastu: so it is. you read consoles and follow instructions. rare combination.
secretsAllFound: all of them. there is nothing left to find here. there was never much, only a man and his machines.
snakeStart: it is yours. arrows move it. esc gives it back.
